name: Murgh Ke Mazedar Tukray- Chicken Bits - India
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lbs chicken breast, no skin, no bone (4 pieces)
2 tbsp dried thyme or 1/2 tsp ajwain seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut each chicken breast piece into thirds lengthwise, then crosswise into 3/4-inch to 1-inch segments. Place in a bowl.
3. Add black pepper, turmeric, cayenne, cumin, thyme, garlic, paprika, and 1 tablespoon of oil. Mix well and set aside for 10 minutes or longer.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wok or large non-stick pan over very high heat.
5. When the oil is very hot, add the chicken. Stir-fry quickly until the chicken pieces are lightly browned or turn opaque on the outside.
6. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and cover loosely with lightly oiled waxed paper (which should sit inside the dish and directly on the chicken). Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the chicken pieces are cooked through.
7. If not to be eaten immediately, remove the chicken pieces from the dish to prevent them from drying out. The seasonings can be premixed and used on fish, beef, and pork.
